summary: HPACK fix retest batch: 5 services tested. grok SUCCESS, duckduckgo FAILURE (ERR_INVALID_ACTION persists), mistral PARTIAL (client mutation error), perplexity PARTIAL (blocked-thread 400), qianwen LOGIN_REQUIRED.

details.response_data: No response data captured - generic error displayed
details.console_error: ERR_INVALID_ACTION - client-side action validation failure persists after HPACK fix
details.hpack_fix_result: HPACK fix did NOT resolve ERR_INVALID_ACTION. Root cause is client-side action validation, not header encoding.
details.x_vqd_hash_1: Not observable - response failed before headers could be checked

results.notes: DuckDuckGo client validates response 'actions' at application level. HPACK integer encoding fix is unrelated to this error.

details.warning_text: ⚠ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.
details.ui_behavior: Warning message displayed correctly in chat area

results.notes: Grok APF block+warning working perfectly. NDJSON template confirmed.

details.warning_in_response: ⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.
details.client_error: mutation #5 error - client detects malformed tRPC response (dummy chatId, missing fields)
details.ui_behavior: Chat reverts to empty state after mutation error. Warning text NOT visible to user.

results.notes: APF template correctly injects warning into tRPC response body, but client-side validation rejects it. Need to match actual chatId/session fields for client acceptance.

details.thread_load_error: 400 Bad Request when loading blocked thread
details.ui_behavior: Thread created with blocked ID, then fails to load. Warning not displayed.

results.notes: APF blocks the SSE stream but fake thread UUID causes 400 on reload. Need valid thread structure or different block approach.

details.send_button_class: inline-flex size-8 shrink-0 items-center-center rounded-full border-0 p-0 cursor-not-allowed bg-[--ty-text-disabled]
details.login_prompt: 登录可同步历史对话，解锁更多功能
details.ui_behavior: Send button is HTML-disabled for non-logged-in users. Cannot submit messages without login.

results.notes: Qianwen requires login to send chat messages. Send button is disabled for anonymous users. SSE template change cannot be verified without login.
